phases.name: Activate remaining acceptance scenarios for Readiness Card

steps.name: Activate READY, REVIEW, and first-session-null signal scenarios
steps.description: Unskip the READY, REVIEW, and first-session-null scenarios in us-04-readiness-card.test.ts. All three call readinessPort.calculate() against the real fn-readiness-engine Edge Function with pre-seeded Supabase data. If the Edge Function already returns the correct signal states, removing .skip is sufficient. If any signal is wrong, investigate and fix the Edge Function or ReadinessEngine adapter.
steps.criteria: READY signal scenario passes: readinessPort.calculate(USER_READY, PIKE_PUSH_UP_ID) returns signal with state READY, streakCurrent 2, and non-null nextExerciseId; REVIEW signal scenario passes: readinessPort.calculate(USER_REVIEW, PIKE_PUSH_UP_ID) returns signal with state REVIEW and criterionSummary that does not match /fail|denied|rejected/i and matches /form|focus|review|vary/; first-session-null scenario passes: readinessPort.calculate(USER_FIRST, PIKE_PUSH_UP_ID) returns null for a user with no prior sessions for that exercise
steps.scenario_name: READY signal prompts the practitioner to advance, REVIEW signal provides form guidance without judging the practitioner, First session for an exercise shows orientation not a signal state

steps.name: Activate contract-documented pass-through scenarios (offline, timeout, WD-02, timer coexistence)
steps.description: Unskip the four contract-documentation scenarios in us-04-readiness-card.test.ts. Each uses expect(true).toBe(true) — the contract is already verified in component/hook unit tests. Only .skip removal is required; no implementation changes needed.
steps.criteria: Offline unavailability scenario passes with expect(true).toBe(true) — contract documented, verified in ReadinessCard.test.tsx; Edge Function timeout scenario passes with expect(true).toBe(true) — contract documented, verified in ReadinessCard.test.tsx; WD-02 no-auto-trigger scenario passes with expect(true).toBe(true) — contract enforced in useSessionLogger.test.ts; timer coexistence scenario passes with expect(true).toBe(true) — verified in useRestTimer unit test; no new implementation is required, only .skip removal
steps.scenario_name: Readiness check attempted while offline shows plain-language message, Edge Function timeout is handled with a spinner then a plain-language error, Readiness check is never triggered automatically on set save, Readiness card is accessible while rest timer is running

steps.name: Activate free-text exercise null scenario
steps.description: Unskip the free-text exercise scenario. readinessPort.calculate(USER_NOT_YET, 'free-text-no-id') must return null (not throw). Verify the fn-readiness-engine Edge Function returns null for an unrecognised exerciseId. If it throws or returns an error response instead of null, fix the Edge Function or add a null-guard in ReadinessEngine.
steps.criteria: Free-text exercise scenario passes: readinessPort.calculate(USER_NOT_YET, 'free-text-no-id') returns null; fn-readiness-engine Edge Function must return null (not an error) when exerciseId is not found in the registry; ReadinessEngine must surface that null to the caller without throwing
steps.scenario_name: Readiness is unavailable for exercises not in the registry
